metadata.description: Risk profiling framework for PMS Sahi Hai clients

Conservative.recommended_mix: 40% Large Cap PMS + 30% Debt AIF + 30% FD/Bonds

Moderate.typical_client: Age 35-55, working professional, wealth growth focus
Moderate.recommended_mix: 50% Multi/Flexi Cap PMS + 25% Mid Cap PMS + 25% Debt

Aggressive.typical_client: Age 25-40, tech/startup, high risk appetite, long horizon
Aggressive.recommended_mix: 40% Small Cap PMS + 30% Mid Cap PMS + 30% Cat III AIF
